title: MATH-500
description: Evolve the editable solver independently for each MATH-500 short-answer question in the local full test split.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns the first choice or 0 when it cannot solve the active MATH-500 question.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher exact-match rate is better across independently evolved MATH-500 question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the final answer string for the current MATH-500 question. Return plain integers when possible; otherwise return a compact mathematical expression. Do not use browsing or external network access.
